meta.titlePrefix: PAUSE - Patterns of AI Use: Self-Examination
meta.description: A short, citation-grounded self-reflection tool for how AI tools may be shaping your habits of thought. Free, anonymous, no login. A reflection tool, not a validated instrument; all scoring runs in your browser; no data is collected.

disclaimerBanner.html: A self-reflection tool, not a validated instrument  ·  for reflection only, not for clinical, educational, or hiring decisions  ·  no data collected, runs entirely in your browser

footer.noCollect: This tool does not collect or transmit your responses. All scoring runs in your browser, and your answers are not saved beyond this session.
footer.leftHtml: PAUSE  ·  Patterns of AI Use: Self-Examination
footer.rightHtml: cc-by 4.0 instrument  ·  mit code  ·  github
footer.quiet: A self-reflection tool. Not a diagnostic. · instrument v0.1-alpha

loadError.title: Could not load
loadError.bodyHtml: This page could not load its data files. If you opened it directly from disk, browsers block local file access for security. Serve the folder with a small web server (for example python -m http.server) and reopen it.
